center.name: 馬莫雷河
center.summary: 馬莫雷河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Crimson-bellied parakeet、Striated antbird、Pearly-breasted conebill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crimson-bellied parakeet is found in the Amazon Basin from the Mamoré River in northeastern Bolivia east into Brazil south of the Amazon River in the states of Mato Grosso, Rondônia, Amazonas, and Pará

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to riverine areas of the Amazon River, and is also found in northern Bolivia (confluent of Mamoré and Madre de Dios River)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: subochracea is found in Brazil south of the Amazon and east of the rios Madeira and Mamoré south into northeastern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department
